description: A vertical designed graphic card combining a photo background, a slogan headline, and a quoted news excerpt, in DOL's branded style. The upper portion is a color photo of a welder at work: a person in a green/teal flame-resistant jacket, blue welding gloves, and a blue welding helmet with purple-tinted lens, kneeling and welding amid sparks/smoke at a construction site with timber and rebar in the background. Across the lower-middle is a white serif headline 'Skilled Trades BOOM!' ('Skilled Trades' italic, 'BOOM!' bold). Below is a white rounded text box with the yellow 'Deseret News' logo and black serif article text: 'A May report by Resume Builder found that 42 percent of Gen Z adults — those born between 1997 and 2012 — are now pursuing blue-collar jobs. For Jimenez, there's the timeless appeal of work that's always in demand, that has fewer barriers to entry, that increases his odds of becoming a business owner.' A small DOL seal is centered at the bottom. Messaging technique: borrowed news credibility plus an upbeat slogan to promote a blue-collar/trades resurgence narrative. Target audience: Gen-Z, young workers, and parents.
notable_text: Skilled Trades BOOM!; Deseret News; A May report by Resume Builder found that 42 percent of Gen Z adults... are now pursuing blue-collar jobs.
